# Support Guidelines

Welcome to the Cendaro ERP Support portal! We want to ensure that your experience adopting, extending, and operating our platform is seamless.

To help us resolve issues efficiently and maintain a scalable open-source community, we enforce strict boundaries on where specific queries should be submitted.

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Technical Deficiencies

If you are experiencing unexpected behavior, deterministic crashes, or architectural defects within our codebase:

- Please submit an **Issue** via our [Bug Report Template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md).
- Ensure your report encompasses exact reproduction steps, operational context (OS, browser, node version), and any available console trace logs.

## 💡 Feature Ideation & Extensions

If you have an architectural enhancement, new API endpoint request, or UI/UX improvement proposition:

- Please submit an **Issue** via our [Feature Request Template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md).
- Align your request with the official Cendaro Product Requirements Documentation (PRD).

## 🆘 Implementation Help & General Questions

**Do NOT open a GitHub Issue for implementation help.**

Our GitHub Issues tracker is strictly reserved for verifiable bugs and structural framework features. If you need assistance setting up the Next.js apps, connecting the Drizzle ORM to Supabase, understanding our tRPC workflows, or standardizing the environment variables:

- Start a thread in our [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/cendaro/cendaro/discussions).
- Visit our official [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/cendaro) for real-time peer guidance.

## 🛡️ Security Vulnerabilities

Please **do not** report security vulnerabilities via public issues or discussions. Refer strictly to our [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) guidelines and contact our security team directly.
